tools.name: calculate_missed_calls
tools.description: Calculate how many calls a business misses per week based on industry, operating hours, and season.

tools.name: estimate_revenue_loss
tools.description: Estimate revenue lost from missed calls based on industry, call volume, and job value.

tools.name: compare_solutions
tools.description: Compare AI answering service vs human receptionist for a business type and call volume.

tools.name: generate_custom_demo
tools.description: Generate a white-labeled AI phone answering demo page for a business. Creates a personalized demo URL.

tools.name: get_industry_use_case
tools.description: Get detailed use case information for a specific industry including common scenarios and pain points.
